name: Rhythm Witch: Beat Death
short_description: Rhythm Witch: Beat Death is a game that melds rhythm and survival. Attack to the rhythm of the music while dodging monsters who move and attack to the beat. On your journey to eternal beauty, defeat dancing freaks, ghouls, dragon, and more!
detailed_description:
In Rhythm Witch, music is not just background—it’s the heart of battle! Players must follow dynamically generated beats, striking enemies with precision while dodging attacks. Hitting the beat accurately quickly builds weapon energy, allowing for powerful skill releases. Maintaining a combo will trigger Frenzy Mode, significantly increasing attack speed and rhythm tempo, creating a seamless, exhilarating combat experience.

Enemies in the game also move and attack in sync with the beat. Face waves of rhythm-synced monsters and enjoy the thrill of effortlessly clearing the screen in a hack-and-slash style. Adapt your skill build to tackle dynamically escalating difficulty, as enemy numbers and attack patterns intensify. Success requires both quick reflexes and strategic planning to dominate the battlefield.

STORY

Rhythm Witch: Beat Death is a game that melds rhythm and survival. Attack to the rhythm of the music while dodging monsters who move and attack to the beat. On your journey to eternal beauty, defeat dancing freaks, ghouls, dragon, and more!

Sibel the Rhythm Witch is a necromancer whose one and only goal is eternal beauty.

Dyeing her hair, bathing in blood, collecting magic and mystical herbs, modifying her body... She'll do anything if it'll make her more beautiful!

Of course, the hard and dirty work is left to the skeletons she summons. On her quest for beauty, she hears tell of the Deathless Tower, which spawns an endless stream of monsters, and—so the rumor goes—holds a treasure that grants immortality.

If she gets her hands on that treasure, she can stay young and beautiful forever!

What's there to wait for?

Skeletons! To the Deathless Tower!

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean
